title: Physician Referrals * People With Inadequate Health Insurance - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Physician Referrals * People With Inadequate Health Insurance 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - People With Inadequate Health Insurance People Without Health Insurance Pregnant Individuals Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates a network of safety net clinics which serve Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members, uninsured individuals, and low-income populations. Services include assistance with OHP enrollment, finding doctors and dentists, and support for basic needs. Website provides tools to locate the clinics that serve OHP members and uninsured individuals in various locations. 401 NE 19th Avenue #200 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by clinic Hours: Referral: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clinics: Hours vary; visit website for more information Email (503) 546-4991 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS
